channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Chicago White Sox sign free agent veteran outfielder
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to a deal with veteran outfielder Austin Slater, who will provide roster depth and familiarity with new director of hitting Ryan Fuller.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NHL referee Mitch Dunning communicative, can move extremities following violent collision
item.description: NHL referee Mitch Dunning is fully communicative and can move all his extremities following a violent collision with Colorado defenseman Josh Manson in Monday night’s game at Philadelphia.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans; no injuries reported
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a game against Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers to honor former coach Pat Riley with a statue outside their downtown arena
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Lakers will honor former coach Pat Riley with a statue outside their downtown arena.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Another Lakers legend to receive statue outside arena
item.description: One of the winningest coaches in NBA history will forever be enshrined in downtown Los Angeles when the Lakers unveil the newest statue on Star Plaza outside Crypto.com Arena.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight draws record betting for a combat sports event
item.description: Jake Paul’s unanimous victory over former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson might have been disappointing from a competitive standpoint, but it drew record betting.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CFL Grey Cup ref makes rookie mistake at coin toss
item.description: Canadian Football League referee Ben Major suffered a faux pas during the coin toss of the Grey Cup on Sunday between the Toronto Argonauts and the Winnipeg Blue Bombers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed Buffalo stadium by screaming at the top of his lungs.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Backup QB Arbuckle leads Toronto past Winnipeg 41-24 for the Argonauts' 19th Grey Cup title
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — Backup quarterback Nick Arbuckle led the Toronto Argonauts to their record-extending 19th Grey Cup title, throwing two second-half touchdown passes in a 41-24 victory over the Winnipeg Blue Bombers on Sunday night at B.C. Place.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Dallas Wings win the WNBA draft lottery, earning the No. 1 pick next year
item.description: The future of the Dallas Wings got a lot brighter as the franchise won the WNBA draft lottery on Sunday and with it the chance to draft UConn star Paige Bueckers with the No. 1 pick. “We know what No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers fall after late TD pushes Seahawks past San Francisco 20-17
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Geno Smith scored on a 13-yard scramble with 12 seconds remaining and the Seattle Seahawks snapped a six-game losing streak against the San Francisco 49ers with a 20-17 victory on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Julius Randle's winning 3-pointer against Suns caps season-high 35-point performance
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — As soon as it left his hands, Julius Randle knew his winning 3-pointer was going in. Randle got the ball with the Minnesota Timberwolves and Phoenix Suns tied at 117 and 2.1 seconds to play.
item.dc:creator: TYLER MASON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz unable to hold fourth quarter lead in loss to Kings
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring 60 points in a losing effort the night before, De'Aaron Fox scored 49 points to lead the Sacramento Kings to a 121-117 win over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bountiful headed back to 5A championship game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful Redhawks are headed back to the 5A championship game. Bountiful cruised past Brighton in the 5A semifinals Friday at Rice-Eccles Stadium, 24-8, and will take on Roy for the 5A state title next week.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Mike Tyson concedes the role of villain to young foe in 58-year-old's fight with Jake Paul
item.description: Friendship is at the heart of how a fight came together between 58-year-old former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and much younger YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Where to watch Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight in Bay Area: Bars showing heavyweight bout
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight world champion Mike Tyson is fighting YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul in a professional boxing match on Friday at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Grand Prix of Long Beach sold ahead of iconic race's 50th edition
item.description: The Grand Prix of Long Long Beach, the longest-running major street circuit race in North America, will have a new owner heading into the 50th edition of the event next year. Penske Entertainment announced its purchase of Grand Prix Association of Long Beach, LLC, from longtime owner Gerald R.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Vonn's last competition came in February 2019, after she dealt with a long series of injuries throughout her career.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Coby White sinks 3 FTs in final seconds, Bulls avoid close call at buzzer to hang on vs. Knicks after blowing 22-point lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It came down to a matter of inches at Madison Square Garden for the Bulls on Wednesday night. This time, it went their way.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Vejmelka makes 49 saves as Utah beats Carolina, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club needed a victory in the worst way, and backup goalie Karel Vejmelka made sure they got one. Vejmelka made a career-high 49 saves, as Utah killed off over ten minutes of power plays in route to a 4-1 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Chicago Bears reconsider old Michael Reese Hospital site as new stadium location
item.description: Chicago Bears are reconsidering the Michael Reese Hospital site as a possible location for a new stadium, as they seek larger private investment and political support for the project.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU ranked 6th in College Football Playoff poll
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AB4 Sports) - It was one of the most thrilling victories in BYU history, and will go down as a true rivalry classic. But perhaps what was even more thrilling for the Cougars than their 22-21 win over Utah Saturday night, was the reception they received late Saturday night in Provo.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodger Stadium improvements could provide leg-up in team's pursuit of World Series repeat
item.description: Work has begun at Dodger Stadium, including renovations to the home team clubhouse, which houses team lockers, showers and communal areas.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Bears fire offensive coordinator Shane Waldron
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Chicago Bears have fired offensive coordinator Shane Waldron. The club has promoted passing game coordinator Thomas Brown to offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: John Robinson, successful football coach at USC and with the LA Rams, has died at 89
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — John Robinson, the veteran football coach who enjoyed many years of success at the University of Southern California and with the Los Angeles Rams, has died. He was 89. The Rams confirmed Robinson's death on Monday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
